articles.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
articles.description: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

articles.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
articles.description: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
articles.description: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

articles.title: This is what some of the world’s largest banks of malware look like stacked as hard drives
articles.description: What would some of the world's largest repositories of malware look like if they were stacked as hard drives, one on top of the other?

articles.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
articles.description: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

articles.title: X launches a History tab for bookmarks, likes, videos, and articles
articles.description: X’s new History tab combines bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single place, expanding the app’s role as a save-it-for-later tool.

articles.title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
articles.description: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their close friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

articles.title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
articles.description: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

articles.title: Who trusts Sam Altman?
articles.description: "I believe I am an honest and trustworthy businessperson," Altman testified in federal court.

articles.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
articles.description: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.

articles.title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners
articles.description: For founders and investors, Anthropic's new offering signals that the AI platform wars are expanding downmarket and that the next major battleground for user acquisition isn't the Fortune 500; it's the 36 million small businesses that make up the backbone of the U.S. economy.

articles.title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
articles.description: A ransomware group has claimed responsibility for hacking the electronics manufacturing giant Foxconn and is attempting to extort the company.

articles.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
articles.description: Alexa for Shopping offers a voice- and touch-enabled shopping experience across mobile, desktop, and Echo Show smart displays. Alexa for Shopping provides more personalized recommendations and automates the shopping experience across Amazon and other online retailers.

articles.title: Anduril raises $5B, doubles valuation to $61B
articles.description: After achieving $2.2 billion in revenue in 2025, the defense tech startup has raised another massive round, led by Thrive and a16z, it says.

articles.title: r/WallStreetBets really hates the SEC’s proposal to weaken quarterly reporting
articles.description: The retail trading subreddit submitted the sharpest criticism yet of the financial regulator's idea of letting companies report twice per year.

articles.title: US lawmakers demand answers from Instructure after Canvas data breaches
articles.description: U.S. House lawmakers want to know how hackers broke into education tech giant Instructure twice and stole reams of data from students who use the company's flagship student data software Canvas.

articles.title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
articles.description: A survey compiled from fintech firm Ramp’s clients’ expense data shows 34.4% of participating businesses are paying for Anthropic services, more than any other AI lab, while only 32.3% pay for OpenAI.

articles.title: Introducing the 6 stages at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 — built for today’s tougher startup market
articles.description: From October 13-15, TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will feature 200+ sessions across six stages, led by 250+ tech leaders shaping the industry today. Register now to save up to $410, plus 50% off a second pass.

articles.title: WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats
articles.description: Meta said these incognito conversations are not saved, and messages will disappear by default once you close the chat.

articles.title: Poppy debuts a proactive AI assistant to help organize your digital life
articles.description: Poppy is an AI-powered app that connects your calendar, email, messages, and other services to surface reminders, suggestions, and tasks based on what’s happening in your life.

articles.title: Solar drone with jumbo jet wingspan broke a flight record—then it crashed
articles.description: The final flight and complex legacy of a pioneering solar-powered aircraft.

articles.title: FCC angers small carriers by helping AT&T and Starlink buy EchoStar spectrum
articles.description: Approval is no surprise after FCC chair pressured EchoStar to sell licenses.

articles.title: Protein in Homo erectus teeth suggests Denisovans gave us some of their DNA
articles.description: Distinct form of tooth protein in Homo erectus shows up in Denisovans—and us.

articles.title: Foiled plot tried to sneak 49 lbs of cocaine into Australia via Xerox printers
articles.description: The drugs had an estimated worth of over $9 million USD.

articles.title: AI invades Princeton, where 30% of students cheat—but peers won't snitch
articles.description: Old "honor code" systems are under strain.

articles.title: The physics of how Olympic weightlifters exploit barbell's "whip"
articles.description: The type of bar matters when it comes to how it bends and recoils, but why is still a mystery.

articles.title: NASA provides some details about Artemis III, but hard decisions remain

articles.title: A new US military wargame series began by simulating a nuclear weapon in orbit
articles.description: US officials have said a nuclear detonation would render portions of low-Earth orbit useless for up to a year.

articles.title: Neanderthals drilled cavities to treat a toothache 59,000 years ago
articles.description: “Every time I go to the dentist, I think about that guy,” researcher says.

articles.title: Altman forced to confront claims at OpenAI trial that he's a prolific liar

articles.title: Windows Update is getting better at saving your PC from buggy drivers
articles.description: Driver recovery can automate what used to be an irritating manual process.

articles.title: Amazon devices chief says a new smartphone is “just not the goal”
articles.description: "We know what customers need right now.”

articles.title: Anthropic blames dystopian sci-fi for training AI models to act “evil”
articles.description: But training on "synthetic stories" that model good AI behavior can help.

articles.title: Gravitational lens shows a galaxy just 800 million years post-Big Bang
articles.description: Early galaxy has elements produced by the Universe's first supernovae.

articles.title: Blue Origin may need external funding to hit ambitious launch targets
articles.description: Are the pockets of Jeff Bezos not as deep as everyone thinks?

articles.title: Daredevil: Born Again S2 gives us a darker, grittier canvas
articles.description: Cinematographer Hillary Fyfe Spera on how she kept things visually fresh for Born Again ’s second season.

articles.title: Rivian adds a new onboard AI assistant to its latest software update
articles.description: The Rivian Assistant is available for both Gen1 and Gen2 hardware.

articles.title: Could this be the moment that drug manufacturing takes off in orbit?
articles.description: "I do think it's a really good historical moment for the space industry."

articles.title: The newest AI boom pitch: Host a mini data center at your home
articles.description: The plan aims to speed up AI compute deployment while compensating residents.

articles.title: FDA chief resigns after Trump admin forced approval of fruity e-cigs
articles.description: Makary reportedly spent his year bucking Trump admin and making industry enemies.

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **AI应用与基础设施加速扩张**：Notion将工作空间打造为AI代理中心；马斯克的xAI在密西西比数据中心未经监管运行近50台燃气轮机；Anthropic预测AI将提前预判用户需求；亚马逊推出由Alexa+驱动的AI购物助手；地热初创公司Fervo Energy因AI数据中心需求上市首日大涨33%。

2. **网络安全与数据风险凸显**：勒索软件黑客声称攻破富士康（苹果、谷歌、英伟达供应商）；报道展示了全球最大规模恶意软件库的硬盘堆叠实景，警示网络威胁的物理规模。

3. **企业融资与资本动向**：安杜里尔（Anduril）融资50亿美元，估值翻倍至610亿美元；Rivian旗下Mind Robotics再获4亿美元融资；Origin Lab获800万美元帮助游戏公司向世界模型构建者出售数据。

4. **社交媒体与平台功能更新**：X推出书签、点赞、视频和文章的历史标签；Instagram新功能“Instants”融合Snapchat与BeReal元素。

5. **行业争议与监管动态**：Reddit子版块r/WallStreetBets强烈反对SEC削弱季度报告制度的提案；外界对OpenAI CEO Sam Altman的信任度引发讨论；Anthropic开始拓展小企业客户市场。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI代理与数据中心需求正以前所未有的速度驱动能源、基础设施和资本市场的连锁反应，同时网络安全威胁与监管博弈也在同步升级。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **模型训练与优化技术进展**：AWS与Hugging Face合作推出基础模型训练与推理的构建模块；Hugging Face还提出了基于混合专家模型（MoE）的预训练方法EMO，旨在实现模块化智能。
2. **AI在金融与广告领域的应用拓展**：Google AI将AI驱动的Google Finance服务扩展至欧洲；同时展示了创意人士利用AI为小型企业制作广告的案例。
3. **OpenAI Codex的广泛应用与安全实践**：多篇博客介绍了Codex在金融团队、工程团队（如AutoScout24）以及NVIDIA工程师中的实际应用；同时强调了在Windows上安全运行Codex的沙箱机制，并分享了OpenAI自身安全运行Codex的经验。
4. **企业级AI规模化部署与安全增强**：OpenAI发布多篇报告，涵盖企业如何规模化采用AI、推出DeployCo帮助商业用户构建智能应用，以及利用GPT-5.5和GPT-5.5-Cyber提升网络安全中的可信访问能力。
5. **AI研究与社区生态发展**：OpenAI分享了“参数高尔夫”项目对AI辅助研究的启示，记录了2026年初ChatGPT采用率的扩大趋势，并推出“校园网络”学生俱乐部兴趣表单，推动AI教育社区建设。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI密集发布Codex在多个行业（金融、工程、网络安全）的落地案例与安全实践，同时推出DeployCo等企业级服务，标志着AI正从实验性工具向规模化、安全化的企业基础设施加速转型。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **国际舆论与历史叙事**：全球时报报道指出，东京审判揭露了靖国神社的扭曲历史观，强调国际社会对历史真相的坚持。
2. **人工智能治理合作**：OpenAI提出建立包括中美在内的全球AI治理机构，显示在技术监管领域寻求国际合作。
3. **中国新能源汽车突破**：中国新能源汽车渗透率在4月达到历史性的61.4%，传统燃油车销量大幅下滑，彰显绿色转型加速。
4. **中美科技与经贸动态**：中国批评美国芯片设备法案，同时特斯拉CEO马斯克、英伟达CEO黄仁勋等科技领袖随特朗普访华，凸显中美科技与经贸关系的复杂性。
5. **中国国际形象提升**：中国在全球支持率上超越美国，同时中国正致力于发展自主文化体系，展现软实力增长。

今日最值得关注的发展是中国新能源汽车渗透率创下61.4%的历史新高，标志着中国在绿色能源转型中取得决定性突破。
